steps.title: Connect cause and result
steps.content: The first sentence says practical effects look more realistic but can be prohibitively expensive. The second sentence describes the resulting strategy: filmmakers blend practical effects with CGI to control costs.

steps.title: Pick the result transition
steps.content: A signals similarity, C adds information, and D restates an idea. The relationship here is cause and effect: because practical effects can be costly, filmmakers use a blended approach. The answer is B.
